postReview.title: Germany 3-3 Italy (5-4 agg): Visitors' fightback not enough as Nagelsmann's team advance
postReview.description: Italy came from 3-0 down to draw 3-3 in Germany, but following Thursday's 2-1 first-leg defeat, the Azzurri exited the Nations League.

preReview.title: Nagelsmann's Germany 'want to write our own history'
preReview.description: Germany are 2-1 up on aggregate heading into the second leg of their Nations League quarter-final against Italy.
